coreResponsibility.summary: A PlayKit JS plugin that manages Kaltura live stream playback lifecycle, handling broadcast state detection, offline/pre-broadcast slates, live edge tracking, DVR functionality, and live viewer count display.

featureOwnership: Live stream broadcast state detection (live, offline, preview)
Pre-broadcast slate display (before stream goes live)
Live tag indicator with states (Live, Preview, Offline)
Live edge tracking and seek-to-live functionality
Live viewer count display and polling
Buffering failover handling for live streams
Media detachment and reattachment for stream recovery
ID3 timed metadata parsing for absolute position tracking
Background player support for slate media playback
dataHandling: Absolute position from ID3 timed metadata

upstream: Kaltura API: livestream.getDetails - retrieves live stream broadcast status
Kaltura API: LiveStream/action/getLiveStreamStats - retrieves live viewer counts
downstream: Kaltura Player UI layer - provides LiveTag, OfflineSlate, LiveViewers components
Kaltura Player middleware layer - intercepts play/load actions
Kaltura Player engine decorator - handles error/ended events
KAVA analytics plugin - provides tampered absolute position data

entryPoints.description: Main entry point - registers the kaltura-live plugin with Kaltura Player
Core plugin class - KalturaLivePlugin implementing IMiddlewareProvider and IEngineDecoratorProvider
KalturaLiveMiddleware - intercepts play/load to wait for live status
KalturaLiveEngineDecorator - handles error recovery and stream end detection
GetStreamDetailsLoader - Kaltura API request builder for livestream.getDetails

configurationOptions.name: checkLiveWithKs
configurationOptions.description: Whether to include KS in live status API calls (for admin preview mode)

configurationOptions.name: isLiveInterval
configurationOptions.description: Interval in seconds between live status polling API calls

configurationOptions.name: bufferingFailoverTimeout
configurationOptions.description: Timeout in seconds before triggering failover when buffering during live playback

configurationOptions.name: preOfflineSlateUrl
configurationOptions.description: Custom background image URL for pre-broadcast slate

configurationOptions.name: postOfflineSlateUrl
configurationOptions.description: Custom background image URL for post-broadcast slate

configurationOptions.name: preOfflineEntryId
configurationOptions.description: Kaltura entry ID for video to play as pre-broadcast slate background

configurationOptions.name: postOfflineEntryId
configurationOptions.description: Kaltura entry ID for video to play as post-broadcast slate background

configurationOptions.name: offlineSlateWithoutText
configurationOptions.description: Hide text messages on offline slates

configurationOptions.name: showLiveViewers
configurationOptions.description: Show live viewer count in player UI
